Prefect Karukia:
Atuba warriors have Wolf blood coursing through our veins. The Wolf is our brother and protector! That's why we carry his image with us.
You will recognize the other Orc tribes by their banners. The Hestui tribe has the grey bear on theirs, the Neruga tribe - the bat, the Urutus have an Orc skull, Duda-mara - the spider and Grandi - the monster eye.
